content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.unified_knowledge_graph
FILE: cosmos/memory/unified_knowledge_graph.py (517 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: Unified Knowledge Graph — 12D Synaptic Connection Mapping
==========================================================
Extends KnowledgeGraphV2 with connections annotated by 12D CST physics.

Theory (CST Framework):
    Every knowledge connection has a "synaptic weight" that evolves
    based on Hebbi

CLASSES:
- SynapticConnection: A knowledge edge annotated with 12D CST physics state.
Extends the concept of Te
  Methods: def effective_weight(self) -> float
  Methods: def resonance_score(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict) -> 'SynapticConnection'
- UnifiedKnowledgeGraph: 12D Synaptic Knowledge Graph.

Wraps KnowledgeGraphV2 (when available) and adds 
  Methods: def add_synaptic_connection(self, source: str, target: str, relation_type: str, physics_state: Optio
  Methods: def query_by_phase(self, phase_center: float=0.78, phase_range: float=0.3, min_weight: float=0.1, li
  Methods: def evolve_connections(self, plasticity_state: Dict)
  Methods: def get_entity_connections(self, entity_id: str) -> List[SynapticConnection]
  Methods: def prune_weak_connections(self, min_weight: float=0.05)
  Methods: def get_12d_topology(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
